title: siler zernyi subsp. ochridanum
intro: Siler zernyi subsp. ochridanum, also known as Balkan siler or Macedonian siler, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Siler zernyi subsp. ochridanum include tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
